steps.title: Use a plain plural noun
steps.content: The phrase one of the hundreds of requires a plural noun naming the items curated by the airport staff. No possession is being shown, so an apostrophe is not needed.

steps.title: Remove apostrophe errors
steps.content: Choice A makes exhibit possessive and singular. Choice B makes hundred possessive. Choice D makes exhibits possessive. The remaining choice gives the plain plural noun phrase needed after one of the. The answer is C.
